text:
Ridley Scott and Glenn Close to Receive Honorary Oscars at 2026 Governors Awards
Director Ridley Scott and actress Glenn Close are among the artists who will finally receive their long overdue Oscars, the Academy of Motion Pictures Arts and Sciences announced Wednesday. Disney animator Floyd Norman will also be recognized, while Killer Films' producers will receive the Thalberg Award.
